bourbaki.description: Bourbaki MCP Server — Mathematical structure modeling for computational science across 7 physics domains

tools.name: analyze_domain
tools.description: Analyze a physics domain: conservation field + morphism chain + constraint propagation. Domains: dft, cfd, md, fem, em, qc, phase_field.

tools.name: compare_domains
tools.description: Compare two physics domains structurally — reveals shared invariants and domain-specific approximations.

tools.name: list_domains
tools.description: List all 7 physics domains with their equation types and morphism chain lengths.

tools.name: build_conservation_field
tools.description: Build conservation matrix field for Navier-Stokes, Euler, Schrodinger, Maxwell, elasticity, MHD, heat, Dirac, Einstein field, Klein-Gordon, wave, Kohn-Sham, Boltzmann, shallow water, nonlinear Schrodinger, Vlasov, Hartree-Fock, or advection-diffusion equations.

tools.name: analyze_morphism_chain
tools.description: Trace how invariants are preserved, lost, or introduced through a domain's morphism chain.

tools.name: compute_riemann_geometry
tools.description: Compute Riemann tensor, Ricci tensor, and scalar curvature from metric and Christoffel symbols.

tools.name: solve_numerical
tools.description: Unified numerical solver for symplectic integration, eigenvalue problems, SCF iteration, conservation law flux Jacobians, variational/FEM Poisson, and continuum mechanics.

tools.name: dimensional_analyze
tools.description: Buckingham Pi theorem dimensional analysis and symbolic dimensional consistency checking.

tools.name: discover_equations
tools.description: Discover governing equations from data using SINDyC or genetic symbolic regression.

tools.name: verify_structure
tools.description: Verify mathematical structure through symbolic, type-system, logic, LLM-semantic, or Lean4-formal layers.

tools.name: translate_engine_params
tools.description: Translate engine-specific parameters (VASP, QE, Gaussian, LAMMPS, GROMACS, Abaqus, Ansys, OpenFOAM, COMSOL) to domain-agnostic parameters.

resources.description: Detailed configuration for a physics domain
Conservation laws reference for an equation type

prompts.name: analyze_simulation
prompts.description: Analyze the mathematical structure of a simulation through its domain

prompts.name: compare_approaches
prompts.description: Compare two physics domains at the structural level

prompts.name: discover_from_data
prompts.description: Discover governing equations from data using symbolic regression
